data.name: Femboy Ghost
data.detailed_description:
You are a ghost that roams freely around the office, aiming to possess each employee. You can possess them when they are in a vulnerable state e.g when they are sleeping, yawning, and stretching. As you possess them, you must match your essence with their breathing rhythm. 

As you succeed, you can control their body which are limited based on their corruption level. Increasing the corruption also lets you gain experience points, which you use to upgrade your abilities.

The game will have four levels: regulars, managers, shareholders, and the president. 

HOW TO PLAY

A D to navigate on the office.

Space to initiate possession and to match breathing rhythm.

Left Mouse Click and Hold to open the radial menu and show available options.

data.short_description: Femboy Ghost is a casual adult game set in a fictional corporation that allows you to possess the bodies of your coworkers up to the president. The main goal is to fully corrupt the same people in the office who exposed you. What will you do once you possess their bodies?

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: x86_64 or ARMv8 (SSE4.2 required for 4.5)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: GPU supporting OpenGL 3.3
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Modern quad-core processor (Intel i5/Ryzen 5)
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU supporting Vulkan 1.2+
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
